themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Forasmuch as I exalted thee out of the dust, and made thee prince over my people Israel; and...". Word-study detail reinforces "עָמְרִ֨י: made Omri - omri, an israelite".
